# Test names in agent test run results (2026-01-18 14:43Z)

_**User (2026-01-17 12:46Z)**_

update @src/routers/agent_tests.py so that when the tests are being run even while it is in progress, the name of the tests in each test run should be present in the details and when status is asked or all runs are fetched the names of the test case should be returned 


{
      "uuid": "347340a6-09ae-4073-85e2-a9d8aecdcdb4",
      "name": "Run 1",
      "status": "done",

      "results_s3_prefix": "agent-tests/runs/347340a6-09ae-4073-85e2-a9d8aecdcdb4",
      "error": null

maintain the same format for this change so that there is a results key with list of dicts but each dict should only have the name of the test and nothing else while in progress

---

The changes have been made successfully. Here's a summary of what was updated:

1. **`TestCaseResult` model** - Made all fields optional and added a top-level `name` field:
   - `name: Optional[str]` - Present during both in-progress and done states
   - `passed`, `output`, `test_case` - Now optional, only present when done

2. **`run_agent_test` endpoint** - When creating the job:
   - Extracts test names from tests
   - Stores `test_names` in job details
   - Initializes results with `{"test_results": [{"name": "test1"}, ...]}`

3. **`run_llm_test_task`** - When setting status to IN_PROGRESS:
   - Sets results with test names

4. **`run_agent_benchmark` endpoint** - Same changes as unit test endpoint

5. **`run_benchmark_task`** - Same changes as unit test task

Now when you query a job that's in progress (queued or running), you'll get:
```json
{
  "uuid": "...",
  "name": "Run 1",
  "status": "in_progress",
  "type": "llm-unit-test",
  "results": [
    {"name": "plans next question"},
    {"name": "another test"}
  ],
  ...
}
```

And when done, you'll get the full results as before with `passed`, `output`, and `test_case` populated.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-backend/.cursor/rules/architecture.md</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 19, lines removed: undefined

```diff
@@ -314,4 +314,23 @@
  
  This allows clients to display progress and per-simulation evaluation results without waiting for all simulations to complete.
+ 
+ ### Agent Test Job Results Format
+ 
+ Agent test jobs (both &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; and &#96;llm-benchmark&#96;) store test names in job details and provide partial results while in progress:
+ 
+ - **Job details**: Contains &#96;test_names&#96; array with names of tests being run
+ - **While queued/in_progress**: &#96;results.test_results&#96; contains &#96;[{"name": "test1"}, {"name": "test2"}, ...]&#96;
+ - **When done**: &#96;results.test_results&#96; contains full results with &#96;passed&#96;, &#96;output&#96;, and &#96;test_case&#96; fields
+ 
+ **Response Model (&#96;TestCaseResult&#96;):**
+ 
+ | Field       | Type                  | When Present            |
+ | ----------- | --------------------- | ----------------------- |
+ | &#96;name&#96;      | &#96;Optional[str]&#96;       | Always (in-progress and done) |
+ | &#96;passed&#96;    | &#96;Optional[bool]&#96;      | Only when done          |
+ | &#96;output&#96;    | &#96;Optional[TestOutput]&#96;| Only when done          |
+ | &#96;test_case&#96; | &#96;Optional[Dict]&#96;      | Only when done          |
+ 
+ This allows clients to display which tests are being run before results are available.
  
  ---
```

</details>

</tool-use>
